info.title: JustinL.MCP.CodeVectors
info.description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that provides semantic search capabilities for codebases using vector embeddings.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate embeddings for a project (uses file tracking to process only changed files)

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the project directory (default: current directory) [default: <path>]

commands.name: chunk
commands.description: Chunk a file or directory into the vector store (always regenerates vectors)

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: Path to the file or directory to chunk

commands.name: delete
commands.description: Delete vectors from the vector store

commands.name: code
commands.description: Delete code vectors from the vector store

commands.name: documentation
commands.description: Delete documentation vectors from the vector store

commands.name: all
commands.description: Delete all vectors (both code and documentation) from the vector store and file tracking

commands.name: all-projects
commands.description: Delete ALL vectors from ALL projects in the vector store (complete wipe)

commands.name: test
commands.description: Test all connections and services (embedding service, vector store, etc.)
